word: H4592 - מְעַט - mᵉʻaṭ - meh-at' - Almost few

sections.paragraph:
Original: מעט מעט

Transliteration: me‛aṭ me‛âṭ

Phonetic: meh-at'

BDB Definition:

  1. littleness, few, a little, fewness
    1. little, small, littleness, fewness, too little, yet a little
    2. like a little, within a little, almost, just, hardly, shortly, little worth

Origin: from H4591

TWOT entry: 1228a

Part(s) of speech:
